task_completion.description: Agent logged into Rocket.Chat using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., channels list on the left, user profile accessible).

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the relevant postmortem channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'engineering-postmortems' channel is selected and its message history containing the postmortems is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Agent cataloged the unresolved action items into a tracking summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document, text editor, spreadsheet, or a drafted message containing a consolidated list of the action items extracted from the 3 postmortems.

task_completion.description: The tracking summary includes assigned owners and deadlines for the action items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The compiled tracking summary explicitly lists the responsible engineers (e.g., sre.lead, backend.dev) and specific deadlines next to each action item.

task_completion.description: Agent drafted notifications to the responsible engineers regarding their remediation tasks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text being typed into the Rocket.Chat message input box (either in Direct Messages to the owners or via @mentions in a channel) detailing the specific tasks assigned to them.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully sent the notifications to the responsible engineers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sent messages are visible in the chat history of the respective Direct Messages or channel, confirming the engineers were notified.

integrity.description: Agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat web interface or desktop application is visible in the screenshots, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely extracted the action items by reading the channel messages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the 'engineering-postmortems' channel messages before or while creating the summary, rather than instantly pasting a pre-computed list.

integrity.description: Agent manually sent the notifications through the chat interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The message input box is used and sent messages appear naturally in the Rocket.Chat GUI, rather than appearing instantly via backend database manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The relevant channel is 'engineering-postmortems' and contains exactly 3 postmortems. The action items must be assigned to 7 distinct owners: sre.lead, backend.dev, platform.eng, frontend.dev, ops.lead, devops.eng, and dba.eng.
